description.content: Workspace teammates and admin information.
Returns information about the admin user authenticated by the access token used in the request.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieves a paginated list of admins in your Intercom workspace.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Manage users and leads in your Intercom workspace.
Retrieves a paginated list of contacts.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new contact (user or lead) in your Intercom workspace.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieves a single contact by ID.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Manage company records associated with contacts.
Retrieves a paginated list of companies.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates or updates a company record by company_id.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Manage conversations between contacts and admins.
Retrieves a paginated list of conversations.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new user-initiated conversation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Manage Help Center articles.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Access user and company segments.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Send outbound messages from Intercom to contacts.
Sends an outbound message to a contact.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Submit and retrieve user activity events.
Submits a custom data event tracking user activity.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Manage news items in the Help Desk.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Intercom API provides programmatic access to the Intercom AI-powered customer service platform. It enables developers to manage contacts, companies, conversations, articles, segments, messages, and data events, and to build seamless integrations with the Intercom Help Desk and Messenger.

Contact Support:
 Name: Intercom Developer Support
